page: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-32 is an x86_64 architecture server instance configured with 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory. This configuration provides a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The instance does not include any integrated GPU hardware or local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage options. Additionally, the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the n4a-highmem-32 offers a high-capacity memory profile relative to its compute allocation. This makes it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads requiring large in-memory datasets without the overhead of higher-tier compute-heavy instances. However, the lack of local storage and GPU accelerators represents a clear tradeoff, limiting its utility for tasks requiring high-speed local caching or hardware-accelerated parallel processing.

This server configuration is designed for memory-intensive workloads. Appropriate applications include medium-sized databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise application servers, and data processing pipelines that require substantial memory capacity to hold working datasets.
description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-32 is an x86_64 architecture server featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring reliance on network-attached storage for data persistence. The high memory density makes this server qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local disk performance or hardware acceleration. It is designed for workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and large-scale enterprise applications.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-32 is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and no local storage, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and databases.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server configuration featuring high memory density per core for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

No integrated GPU accelerators or local storage included
Zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses provided
Suited for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
